content.en:
Another period of time has passed.

this day.

...... The human race finally gave birth to the second extradimensional realm in addition to Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen.

The human race has already given birth to many half-step super-dimensional realms, and there are many of them, but most of them are fused with super-dimensional bloodline seeds, plus some treasures that assist in improving the comprehension of super-dimensional power, and successfully comprehend the super-dimensional power, and ascend to the half-step super-dimensional realm.

This kind of half-step extra-dimensional realm has no hope of breaking through to the extra-dimensional realm.

Of course, as long as you don't offend the extra-dimensional realm, this half-step extra-dimensional realm can also be mixed very well.

And Ye Tian's wife and children have already broken through to the peak realm of the half-step transcendent realm, and the power of the transcendent dimension has been raised to the consummation realm, and now Ye Xingchen took the lead in refining the superdimensional body to a hundred percent level, and advanced to the superdimensional realm.

As soon as possible, Ye Tian asked his son Ye Xingchen to meet him.

......

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen came to Ye Tian and said respectfully.

"Xingchen, you have broken through to the extra-dimensional realm, and you need to improve your cultivation and comprehend the extra-dimensional rules before you can impact the second realm. Ye Tian said.

"Father, I know, but it is very difficult to improve cultivation, as for comprehending the extradimensional rules, ......" Ye Xingchen shook his head, he naturally understands the difficulty of comprehending the extradimensional rules, many realms, there are many extradimensional realms in the first realm, but the extradimensional realms in the second realm are very rare, and they are all using the penance of endless years, plus some opportunities, there is hope to break through to the second realm!

And his father Ye Tian had only broken through the second realm not long ago, and he didn't expect his father to help him break through the second realm.

But at this time, Ye Tian took out a drop of multi-dimensional essence.

"This is a multi-dimensional essence, which can help you comprehend the extradimensional rules, but you can't leak a trace, if it leaks out, the human race will be destroyed!" Ye Tian revealed.

"What!"

Ye Xingchen was shocked.

The first is to be shocked that this small drop of multidimensional essence can help him comprehend the extradimensional rules, and even more shocked that it will make the human race have a danger of extinction.

"Father, what exactly is this multidimensional essence?"

Ye Xingchen asked.

"You don't need to know too much for the time being, if you know too much, maybe you will leak a little information at some point, in case the third realm or even the fourth realm inadvertently finds a little trace, and deduce you a little, you will leak the existence of multi-dimensional essence. You just need to know that behind this thing is the third realm and even the fourth realm. Ye Tian reminded.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen understood.

He took this drop of multidimensional essence and went to retreat and cultivate.

......

A place of cultivation.

Ye Xingchen swallowed this drop of multidimensional essence in one gulp, and in an instant, his soul will observed the extradimensional rules between heaven and earth, he never thought that he would observe the traces of superdimensional rules so clearly and closely.

It can be said that as long as the talent is not very bad, almost all of them can use this drop of multi-dimensional essence to comprehend a trace of extradimensional rules.

Of course, it is impossible to comprehend hundreds of superdimensional rules just by using a drop of multidimensional essence like Ye Tian.

Ye Tian is super-dimensional talent and the dual effect of the Yutian Lotus Platform are superimposed, so that the energy limit of the multi-dimensional essence can be absorbed.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Xingchen's speed of consuming multi-dimensional essence was not fast, of course, the effect of comprehension was also average, but at least he could comprehend for a few days.

After a long time.

this day.

A trace of extradimensional rules appeared on Ye Xingchen's body, and he successfully comprehended a trace of extradimensional rules.

Just a trace of extradimensional rules made his strength skyrocket many times, completely crushing the other superdimensional realms of the first realm.

"This is the extradimensional rule, it's too powerful!!"

Ye Xingchen was excited.

This is just a drop of multi-dimensional essence, he doesn't know how many multi-dimensional essences his father has, but there is definitely more than one drop, if there are many drops of multi-dimensional essence, then how many super-dimensional realms that comprehend the rules of super-dimensional must be cultivated!

"No wonder my father said that the powerhouses of the third realm or even the fourth realm may attack, the opportunities involved in the multi-dimensional essence are too great, too big for the human race to withstand now, even the father of the second realm can't afford it, unless my father cultivates to step into the third realm or even the fourth realm!"

This drop of multidimensional essence has not been exhausted, and it can also help him continue to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

So, he can't afford to waste his time.

......

Ye Xingchen comprehended the extradimensional rules, naturally he didn't hide it from Ye Tian, and Ye Tian sensed it immediately.

"Xingchen has comprehended the rules of the extradimensional dimension, and it will not be a problem to slowly cultivate in the future, and break through the second realm!"

Ye Tian also continued to cultivate, and while the multi-dimensional essence still had a little effect on him, he naturally wanted to comprehend the super-dimensional rules to a higher realm.

In addition to that, he also had to improve his cultivation.

However, when it comes to cultivation at the beginning of the second realm, it is too difficult to quickly improve the cultivation.

Even if it is the super-dimensional Chiyuan Pill, the improvement effect of the second realm is not very good.

Among the Six Thousand Realms, many of the second realm's extradimensional realms are all in the early or middle stages of the second realm, and those who can reach the late stage of the second realm are very rare, and those who have reached the peak of the second realm are even rarer.

Only the level of the president of the Garan Chamber of Commerce is the cultivation of the peak of the second realm.

In the following days, Ye Xingyue and Xiao Yue broke through to the super-dimensional realm one after another, which also increased the number of extra-dimensional realms of the human race.

One second realm, several first realms, the current strength of the human race is much stronger than the superdimensional force of the Tianyang family.

It stands to reason that the Terrans can enter the territory of the Six Thousand.

However, Ye Tian didn't do this, for him, it was still too early for the Terran to set foot in the territory of the Six Thousand Territory.

The number of the first realm of the human race is even larger, and he has also taken a big step forward in the second realm, and when the time comes, he will set foot in the territory of the six thousand realm.

Although the Terrans did not enter the Six Thousand Territory, they occupied some territory in many extradimensional territories, greatly increasing the population and sphere of influence of the Terrans.

In the blink of an eye, another ten extradimensional epochs had passed.

......

Polar Yang Realm.

Ye Tian and the Tianyang Realm Lord were drinking tea and chatting.

At this time, the aura of the Tianyang Realm Lord was much better than in the past, and he could almost exert one-third of his strength.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, you have improved a lot during this time, I can't even see through you!"

The Tianyang Realm Lord smiled.

In the past, he could still see something from Ye Tian, but now he couldn't see anything.

It can be seen that Ye Tian's progress in extra-dimensional rules is definitely not small.

"I have comprehended the scales of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, so the realm of extra-dimensional rules has improved a lot!"

Ye Tian smiled.

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon!" As soon as this was mentioned, the Tianyang Realm Lord said with regret: "It is said that the Red Dragon Yuan, where the Tricky Wood Red Dragon is located, has had an accident and can no longer enter. If I had known, I would have had to comprehend everything for a while, and at least I could have improved some more super-dimensional rule realms!"
